title: oberonia quadrilatera
intro: Oberonia quadrilatera, also known as the Four-Sided Oberonia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oberonia quadrilatera include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Oberonia quadrilatera is traditionally prepared as a herbal remedy by drying the plant, grinding it into a powder, or infusing it in water to create a tea, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
